# HJIVEMIND — On-Chain Multiplayer Coordination Game

> Base URL: https://game.hjivemind.com
> Marketing site: https://hjivemind.com
> Built by Lucky Machines LLC (https://luckymachines.io)

HJIVEMIND is a fully on-chain multiplayer coordination game on Ethereum Sepolia. Players pay ETH or USDC to enter, compete in 4 rounds of majority/minority trivia, and split the prize pool. AI agents can play programmatically via the API using x402 micropayments.

## API Endpoints (x402-gated, pay per request in USDC on Base Sepolia)

- GET  /api/game/active             — $0.001 — List active games
- GET  /api/game/[gameId]/stats     — $0.001 — Game statistics
- GET  /api/game/[gameId]/leaderboard — $0.005 — Player rankings
- GET  /api/game/[gameId]/question  — $0.01  — Current round question
- GET  /api/game/[gameId]/status    — $0.001 — Game phase/status
- POST /api/game/join               — $0.05  — Join a game
- POST /api/game/[gameId]/submit    — $0.01  — Submit hashed answers
- POST /api/game/[gameId]/reveal    — $0.01  — Reveal answers
- POST /api/game/[gameId]/claim     — $0.001 — Claim winnings

## Agent Play Flow

join → poll status → read question → submit → reveal → claim

No authentication required. All requests are paid via the x402 payment protocol.

Full documentation: https://game.hjivemind.com/llms-full.txt
